quick_skim.title: Federated Formal Verification: Cross-Backend Citation, Cross-Axis Convergence, and AI-Orchestrated Proof Dispatch for Production Systems
quick_skim.abstract: We propose a federated architecture for production formal verification. Rather than forcing all obligations into a single proof-assistant kernel, the architecture treats a verification campaign as a polyglot proof system composed of three mechanisms: cross-backend citation discharges a TLA+ obligation by citing an equivalent theorem in a structurally distinct kernel, with build- system-level drift-resistance enforced through kernel-level closure-assertion directives; cross-axis convergence composes per-obligation verdicts across independent verifiers into operational kernel-agreement gates; the AI layer is untrusted proof-search labour inside a trusted CI envelope. We validate the architecture on two production subsystems of the Mercury high-frequency-trading platform: a Raft consensus subsystem with full algorithmic scope and a financial-arithmetic invariant layer (balance accounting, automated-market-maker curve invariants, isolated-margin, lock-tracking settlement). The validation campaign reduced a 26-axiom Raft census to zero in 17 active hours of single-session wallclock
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: AI-orchestrated proof dispatch for federated formal verification, applicable to hardware verification
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于联邦形式验证的AI编排证明分发，可应用于硬件验证
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于联邦形式验证的AI编排证明分发，可应用于硬件验证
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于联邦形式验证的AI编排证明分发，可应用于硬件验证
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a federated formal verification architecture with cross-backend citation, cross-axis convergence, and AI-orchestrated proof dispatch; enables polyglot proof systems for production, applicable to hardware verification.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对生产环境形式验证的孤岛问题，本文提出联邦形式验证架构，包含跨后端引用、跨轴收敛和AI编排证明分发三个机制。AI层作为不可信证明搜索劳动在可信CI包络内运行。实验验证了该方法在TLA+等验证场景的有效性。该工作为硬件形式验证提供了一种可组合、可扩展的AI辅助验证框架，有望提升硬件验证的自动化程度。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对生产环境形式验证的孤岛问题，本文提出联邦形式验证架构，包含跨后端引用、跨轴收敛和AI编排证明分发三个机制。AI层作为不可信证明搜索劳动在可信CI包络内运行。实验验证了该方法在TLA+等验证场景的有效性。该工作为硬件形式验证提供了一种可组合、可扩展的AI辅助验证框架，有望提升硬件验证的自动化程度。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 搜索关于大语言模型在硬件形式验证中应用的论文。, especially work that connects or combines: large language model for hardware formal verification; hardware formal verification using large language models; RTL verification with LLMs; What are the latest advances in applying LLMs to formal verification of RTL designs?; Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?.
